question: Is the scene lighting successfully converted from harsh direct sunlight to a soft, diffused overcast effect?
Are the distinct hard shadows removed from the faces of all individuals, including under the eyes, noses, and chins?
Does the overall image remain bright and vibrant, avoiding a dark, flat, or washed-out appearance?
Are the cast shadows on the ground, blanket, and surrounding objects (guitar, cooler) softened to match the overcast lighting?
Are specular highlights on skin, hair, and reflective surfaces (sunglasses, guitar body) diffused to match the soft daylight?
Does the background lighting (sky and architecture) logically match the new overcast aesthetic without conflicting bright sun cues?
Is the skin texture in previously shadowed facial regions reconstructed naturally, avoiding a smudged or plastic-like appearance?
Do the faces retain natural 3D contouring and depth, ensuring they do not look artificially flat after shadow removal?
Are skin tones consistent and natural-looking across all subjects, without patchy discoloration?
Are all subjects (approx. 10 people) preserved with their original identities, poses, and expressions?
Is the clothing of all subjects preserved without changes to colors, patterns, or structure?
Are accessories such as sunglasses and watches preserved in their original positions and shapes?
Is the smartphone held by the woman in the foreground preserved without deformation or loss of detail?
Is the acoustic guitar preserved without structural changes or artifacts?
Are the picnic items (cooler, chips, bubble machine, cups) and the blanket pattern preserved?
Is the university building with the clock tower in the background preserved and visible?
Is the image free from unnatural AI artifacts, such as edge halos, ghosting, or distorted facial features?
Is the overall image sharpness and clarity maintained without unintended blurriness?
